criteria_results.detail: Static inspection shows package.json includes "run:validator-b": "node scripts/run-validator-b.mjs".

criteria_results.criterion: scripts/run-validator-b.mjs exists and can execute in dry-run mode without invoking Gemini.
criteria_results.detail: The script exists and dry-run logic is present, but the required dry-run command could not be executed in this validation environment because node/npm execution was rejected by policy.

criteria_results.criterion: Validator-B runner writes normalized run metadata and result artifacts under tasks/handoffs/{TASK-ID}/.
criteria_results.detail: Static inspection shows non-dry-run paths under tasks/handoffs/<task>: validator-b-run-<attempt>.json, validator-b-stdout-<attempt>.json, validator-b-stderr-<attempt>.log, validator-b-prompt-<attempt>.txt, and expected validator-b-result*.json.

criteria_results.criterion: Validator-B runner rejects handoffs with agent values other than Validator-B.
criteria_results.detail: Static inspection shows parseHandoff throws unless data.agent is exactly Validator-B.

criteria_results.criterion: Validator-B runner performs the same common secret-like payload preflight as Generator and Validator-A before invoking a model CLI.
criteria_results.detail: Static inspection shows assertNoSecretLikeContent is applied to the raw handoff, included context files, and the assembled Validator-B prompt before spawning Gemini.

criteria_results.criterion: Harness audit includes Validator-B pipeline checks.
criteria_results.detail: Static inspection shows scripts/audit-harness.mjs checks package.json and run-validator-b.mjs for Validator-B command, handoff rejection, independence, and prompt secret preflight markers.

criteria_results.criterion: Relevant guides no longer imply Validator-B is missing after implementation.
criteria_results.detail: Static inspection shows validator and generator pipeline guides were updated to describe Validator-B Gemini CLI wrapper, Tier 3 independent handoff, and resource-failure handling.

criteria_results.criterion: node --check and npm run audit:harness pass.
criteria_results.detail: git diff --check completed successfully, but node --check scripts/run-validator-b.mjs and npm run audit:harness were rejected by local execution policy before they could run.

errors.location: validation commands: node --check scripts/run-validator-b.mjs; npm run audit:harness; npm run run:validator-b -- TASK-20260430-001 --input tasks/handoffs/TASK-20260430-001/validator-b-input.json --gemini-bin gemini --attempt 1 --dry-run
errors.description: Required executable validation could not be completed because node/npm commands were blocked by the current policy, so the dry-run and audit pass criteria are not proven.
errors.suggestion: Re-run Validator-A in an environment where read-only node/npm validation commands are permitted, then execute node --check scripts/run-validator-b.mjs, npm run run:validator-b -- TASK-20260430-001 --input tasks/handoffs/TASK-20260430-001/validator-b-input.json --gemini-bin gemini --attempt 1 --dry-run, and npm run audit:harness.
errors.evidence: Tool returned rejected: blocked by policy for node --check scripts/run-validator-b.mjs, npm run run:validator-b ... --dry-run, and npm run audit:harness. git diff --check exited 0 with only line-ending warnings.

log.action: Read required validator context and task artifacts
log.result: Reviewed ARCHITECTURE.md, SECURITY.md, docs/agents/validator.md, Task Spec, Generator result, package.json, runner script, audit script, handoff validator, guides, fixture handoff, and ledger.
Found required package command, Validator-B agent guard, secret preflight calls, artifact path writes, audit checks, and guide updates.
node/npm validation commands were rejected by policy; git diff --check passed with line-ending warnings only.
